announcements.title: sf-pi v0.191.0 — devbar: add configurable colors
announcements.body: devbar: add configurable colors — devbar: avoid control regex analyzer findings

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
